calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2003 Continued To Nov-03-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Michael C. Hall, Esq., for Plaintiff.
No appearance by the Defendant Keith Murry.
09:15 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Peter Kuehl was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises located at: 344 Ellis St., #24, San Francisco.
Principal $1,606.50
Costs of $171.60
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEPT. 206 MICHAEL C. HALL, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DFT DID NOT APPEAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN, MATTER TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL ON 11/3/03. CLERK I. HAMMER
